Thanks for contributing to ClipFetch! Keep PRs small and focused.

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] ClipFetch Watch (streaming interface) task

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and revert-safe.
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes.
- [ ] `mypy` passes.
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes locally.
- [ ] Where Python is touched, it stays green on the **Python 3.9** floor (compatible typing / `from __future__ import annotations`).
- [ ] Any relevant opt-in test marker was run (`integration`, `semantic_integration`, `transcription_integration`, `duplicate_integration`) — note results below.
- [ ] Behavior changes include tests.
- [ ] Docs / help text / API schema updated as needed.
- [ ] No secrets, cookies, absolute paths, or expiring CDN/media URLs are logged, persisted, or exposed.

## Verification

<!-- How did you verify this works end to end? Commands run, output, screenshots (for docs). -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should look at closely, trade-offs, follow-ups. -->
